layout_strategy.overall_layout: Grid-based 2-column layout on desktop: Left column (Main Analysis, spans 8 or 9 cols) and Right column (Context Sidebar, spans 4 or 3 cols). Mobile follows a stacked layout.
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8) inside cards. Use gap-6 or gap-8 for grid layouts to let the dense text breathe.
layout_strategy.borders_and_shadows: Strictly sharp UI: rounded-none or rounded-sm maximum. No box-shadows. Rely entirely on 1px solid borders (border-[#E2E8F0]) for structural definition.
layout_strategy.header_section: Full-width top section. Contains Case Title (H1, Playfair), Type, Jurisdiction, Presiding Judge, and Status Badge. Followed immediately by the Stage Progress Bar.
layout_strategy.hero_verdict: Chief Justice Final Verdict Card must be extracted from the bottom and placed at the TOP of the Main Analysis column. Use inverted colors (bg-[#0B192C] text-white) with gold (#C5A059) accents for high contrast. This gives users the final answer immediately.

progressive_disclosure.pipeline_tabs: Use Shadcn Tabs to separate the deliberation stages (Tab 1: Individual Analyses, Tab 2: Cross-Review, Tab 3: Synthesis). This solves the vertical scroll fatigue.
progressive_disclosure.council_cards: Inside Tab 1, display the 4 Council Member Cards in a 2x2 grid. Use Shadcn Accordions inside these cards to hide verbose text (arguments, laws) by default.
progressive_disclosure.context_sidebar: Sticky right sidebar. Top module is Judge Intelligence Panel. Below it, use a Shadcn Accordion to group 'Case Facts', 'Relevant Laws', and 'Similar Cases'. This compresses massive amounts of text into a scannable format.

components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs: Customize with transparent list background, sharp corners, and a gold bottom border (border-b-2 border-[#C5A059]) for the active state indicator.
components.accordion: Shadcn Accordion: Use for Analyst details in cards and the right sidebar contextual panels.
components.cards: Use raw HTML divs or Shadcn Card stripped of all shadows. Use border border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white.
components.progress_bar: Segmented pipeline visual or steps component indicating current stage, placed below the case header.
components.badges: Sharp badges (rounded-none), uppercase tracking-wider, for status labels.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive cards should have a subtle border color transition to gold on hover (hover:border-[#C5A059] transition-colors duration-300).
motion_and_interactions.tab_transitions: Content inside tabs should fade in cleanly without aggressive motion.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (Tabs, Accordion triggers, Buttons, Links) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='tab-stage-1', data-testid='accordion-case-facts').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup required Shadcn components: tabs, accordion, card, badge.
Ensure fonts 'Playfair Display' and 'IBM Plex Sans' are imported correctly in CSS/HTML.
Refactor the monolithic scroll layout into a 2-column grid layout (Main Content Left, Context Sidebar Right).
Implement Shadcn Tabs to split the 4 stages of analysis into separate views. Tab 1 should show the 4 analyst cards in a grid.
Elevate the 'Chief Justice Final Verdict Card' to the top of the main column, styled as a high-contrast dark navy card.
Wrap 'Case Facts', 'Relevant Laws', and 'Similar Cases' inside a Shadcn Accordion in the right sidebar.
Strip all shadows and roundness from components. Enforce sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm) and 1px borders.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
